notes.strategy: Decoder-only FT: encoder frozen, decoder all params updated
notes.evidence: NeurIPS 2024 STAR: Dec-only WER 4.4% < LoRA 5.1% < Full 5.2% (CHiME-4)
notes.lr: 1e-6 for Turbo (4 decoder layers, fragile — higher LR causes instability)
notes.bf16: BF16 preferred over FP16 for V3 family (loss spike prevention)
notes.eval: WER/CER-based model selection — val loss is unreliable (HF Discussion #107)
notes.replay: 10% Common Voice mixed to prevent catastrophic forgetting. Set enabled=true to use.
notes.mel_bins: 128 (v3 specific, DO NOT use v2 processor)
